company_type: Oil and Gas Exploration and Production

risks: Pipeline and gathering system capacity constraints
Shortages or delays in availability of drilling rigs, equipment, and labor
Increases in cost of drilling rigs, equipment, and labor
Cyberattacks targeting oil and gas distribution systems

regulatory_risks: Federal, state, and local laws and regulations restricting production
Changes in taxes and other amounts payable to governments
Price or gathering rate controls
Environmental protection laws and regulations
Security for plugging, abandonment, and decommissioning obligations in Gulf of America
Hydraulic fracturing regulations
Methane emissions regulations
Flaring regulations
Water disposal regulations
Greenhouse gas (GHG) cap-and-trade programs
Carbon taxes
Reporting and tracking programs for emissions
Restriction of emissions
Electric vehicle mandates
Combustion engine phaseouts
EPA proposed rule to assess charge on certain methane emissions
Bureau of Ocean Energy Management (BOEM) requirements for supplemental assurances of performance for Gulf of America decommissioning
Bureau of Safety and Environmental Enforcement (BSEE) decommissioning orders
Energy Profits Levy (EPL) in United Kingdom - 35% levy on oil and gas profits (effective January 1, 2023 through March 31, 2028)
Proposed U.K. changes to increase EPL to 38% and extend through March 31, 2030
U.K. infrastructure modernization requirements
Corporate Alternative Minimum Tax (CAMT) - 15% on applicable corporations (effective January 1, 2024)
OECD Pillar Two Model Rules - global minimum tax of 15%
Changes to tax laws affecting oil and gas exploration and development
Repeal of percentage depletion allowance proposals
Elimination of current deductions for intangible drilling and development costs proposals
Extension of amortization period for geological and geophysical expenditures proposals
State and local coastal resources management regulations
Louisiana restoration lawsuits and coastal zone regulations
Environmental remediation requirements
Climate change legislation and regulations
ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) disclosure requirements

sanction_risks: Trade tensions between U.S. and other countries
Actions taken by OPEC and OPEC+ affecting oil supply and prices
Russian war in Ukraine impacting global markets
Armed conflict in Israel and Gaza
Political and economic instability in Egypt
Foreign currency shortage in Egypt affecting payments from EGPC
Potential expropriation and resource nationalization risks
Forced renegotiation or modification of existing contracts
Changes in laws and regulations in foreign jurisdictions
Border disputes affecting oil and gas properties
Government sanctioning requirements for development activities
